title: 皐月賞の後に・春先の奇跡！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek forces herself to race in the Satsuki
Sho and miraculously pulls off a victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She gives me total credit for her winning what was
said to be a hopeless race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She then praises me for being an "amazing
trainer."
